title: CherryVillages
body:
## **Add More Villages Like Cherry Village And Swamp Village!**

### Why CherryVillages?
CherryVillages is a beautiful Village mod that add more villages that isn't available in Vanilla Minecraft. You Can Support Me On Patreon and tell Me Some propositions.

### CherryVillages Mod includes:
- Small Cherry Village
- Small Swamp hut inspired Village
- More Villages/houses in Comming Soon!
